data.raw_prompt: Build a CRM with login, contacts, dashboard, role-based access, and premium plan with payments. Admins can see analytics.
data.app_description: A customer relationship management platform with role-based access, premium features, and analytics.
constraints: Premium plan required for advanced analytics
Users can only edit their own contacts

ambiguities.description: Whether managers can also see analytics
ambiguities.assumption: Only admins can see analytics as stated
Using Stripe as default payment provider
